The Caricaceae family consists of about 17 species, mostly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. Further research is needed to determine if Papaya posopora is a misnomer or a classification in the works.
uses: Papaya posopora doesn't seem to be a known species of papaya. However, papaya (Carica papaya) is known for its medicinal uses. The fruit, leaves, and seeds of the papaya plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and inflammation.
